quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).
Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency across brand icons and ensure minimum legibility sizes for low-vision audiences.
rules.rule_text: Icons must follow a minimal line illustration style (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work). Icon colors and backgrounds may only be adjusted within the approved brand palette, defaulting to Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds. For accessibility, icons in emails must have a minimum render size of 32x32px (dimension.accessibility.icon_render_min = 32px).
